qna_pairs.Query: What type of flour is graham flour?
qna_pairs.Gold Answer: A special variation of whole wheat flour, made by mixing finely milled white flour with coarsely milled bran and wheatgerm.

qna_pairs.Query: What is the original flour used to make Graham crackers?
qna_pairs.Gold Answer: Graham flour was the original flour used to make Graham crackers.

qna_pairs.Query: What can be used as a substitute for graham flour in recipes?
qna_pairs.Gold Answer: Plain whole wheat flour can also be used as a substitute in recipes, but the texture of the resulting baked goods will be different than if graham flour had been used.
